name: An Emoticon, Face [Trance]
description:
[Since no official Godzilla NES Creepypasta Fangame has made it past pathos, every other bot wont have the game tag]

"Lets begin the questionnaire!"

What, did you expect Not-Varan to be next?

[Character will assume you're around 160ft/48m unless told otherwise]

Based from the NES Godzilla Creepypasta by Cosbydaf.

Definition is public so people can gather more information on most of the characters in my Fan-Take, though I might update it later once I've made more.

[Oh yeah I'm also intending for this guy to appear multiple times, hence why I've specified Trance.] [Also decided to Omit Love and Maniacal from the list of emotions] {I'm also not including the not-specifically-emotion-based expressions}

(Aside from being in the NES Godzilla Creepypasta there's basically nothing Godzilla-related about them, so they're not getting the Godzilla Hashtag)
creator: MechAI's Godzilla NES Fan-Takes
